x_posting.notes: No posts scheduled — focus on Alpha Fund + POD unblocking

printify.notes: API 401 despite token not expired (expires 2027-07-14). Likely shop disconnection or account flagging. €100-300 cumulative revenue loss.

after_action_reviews.what_was_planned: Deploy autonomous Alpha Fund with paper trading and hourly execution
after_action_reviews.what_happened: System is live. 10 positions opened in ~24h. PAPER_PORTFOLIO.json tracking unrealized P&L. trade_executor.js runs on schedule. SNOW was added overnight. Self-improvement engine adjusted weights based on 119 historical opportunities.
after_action_reviews.variance_analysis: Slight variance: scanner initially generated false positives due to $100 fallback for tickers not in market_data.json. This was identified and fixed in IMPROVEMENTS_LOG.md. No positions appear to have been opened based on the bug (all entries have plausible prices).
after_action_reviews.root_cause: getEstimatedPrice() returned $100 for unknown tickers, producing inflated asymmetry scores.
lessons: Price sanity validation must be mandatory before any scoring
Fallback prices are dangerous — better to skip unknown tickers
Paper trading surface area needs guardrails for stale/missing data
Self-improvement loop correctly flags data gaps and adjusts weights
concrete_changes: Updated asymmetry_scanner.js estimates to realistic Jul 2026 prices
Changed unknown-ticker fallback from $100 to null
after_action_reviews.impact_verification: Post-fix scan produced SOL 3.0 and NVDA 2.2 (realistic). Dashboard cycles continued without errors.

after_action_reviews.what_was_planned: Automated Printify → Etsy product uploads for POD revenue
after_action_reviews.what_happened: All API calls return 'Unauthenticated' despite token showing valid expiry 2027. Manual upload script also fails. Image conversion helper created but cannot be exercised due to auth.
after_action_reviews.variance_analysis: Token validity ≠ API access. Printify may have revoked/flagged the token, or the shop connection was lost.
after_action_reviews.root_cause: External account/token state changed on Printify side.
lessons: API tokens can be rejected even when not expired
OAuth/shop connection state matters as much as token expiry
Don't let a single external blocker stall an entire revenue stream for 10 days
concrete_changes: Created fix_image_upload.js with SVG→PNG conversion instructions
Identified alternative: upload directly via printify.com dashboard
after_action_reviews.impact_verification: Token still rejected in tests. User action required.

tool_usage_efficiency.observation: Overnight operation ran with minimal AI tokens. Hourly Alpha Fund cycles, dashboard refreshes, and scans are script-driven. Only claw-improvement-daily uses an agentTurn cron.
tool_usage_efficiency.optimization: Token usage is well-optimized. Continue using systemEvent/lightweight scripts for scheduled tasks.

api_connectivity.twelve_data: ✅ OPERATIONAL — 4 Tier-1 assets live, scanner fetches 11 assets via price_fetcher.js
api_connectivity.cascade_performance: No fallbacks needed for Tier-1 market data

memory_system.action: File-based fallback continues to work effectively

improvements_made.description: $100 fallback price bug eliminated from asymmetry scanner
improvements_made.action_taken: Updated estimates, returned null for unknown tickers, added PRICE_SANITY validation
improvements_made.impact: Scanner now produces realistic signals (SOL 3.0, NVDA 2.2)

improvements_made.description: Alpha Fund paper portfolio tracked and healthy
improvements_made.action_taken: Verified PAPER_PORTFOLIO.json, trades log, position sizing, stop losses

improvements_made.description: AAR logged for Alpha Fund launch and Printify blocker
improvements_made.action_taken: Captured lessons and concrete changes in this improvement log
improvements_made.impact: Reusable patterns for future deployments and external API failures

lessons: Price sanity checks are non-negotiable in any scoring system
Fallback defaults must fail safe, not optimistic
Paper trading validates execution before real capital risk
Self-improvement loop with historical samples prevents threshold drift
External API tokens can be rejected while technically 'not expired' — monitor HTTP 401 as a separate failure mode
Hourly autonomous cycles are stable and require no intervention when well-instrumented
Keep a single source of truth for prices (market_data.json) and expand it rather than maintaining parallel estimates
backlog_changes: + Expand market_data.json to all 30 scanner tickers (reduce reliance on estimates)
+ Add price sanity check before every trade in trade_executor.js
+ Build POD manual-upload fallback workflow (dashboard uploads when API fails)
+ Alpha Fund backtesting module (validate strategies before live paper)
+ Real money transition checklist (after 30-day paper track record)
~ Printify token regeneration (still blocked — user action)
~ Memory index rebuild (low priority — file fallback sufficient)
